action_required: DECIDER: Before integrating EXP-450 P2, review the 22.6 Hz attribution. EXP-450 P2 attributes 22.6 Hz to 'flat-plate resonator with published exponentially-decaying firmament profile' but the existing review (detail_evidence of WIN-029) attributes 22.6 Hz to the linear radial average H_eff = H₀·(L/R)·(1−exp(−R/L)) ≈ 3,316 km. Using the term 'flat-plate resonator' without naming the specific averaging convention mirrors the dome's own formula-switching behavior — exactly the critique we level at the dome. P2 should name the averaging convention explicitly (linear radial average) when attributing 22.6 Hz.
notes: Scientific precision issue. EXP-450 not yet integrated. Decider should check with analyst before applying P2 as written.
